zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds於1508年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾法爾登時，他的父親Christian Lambe26歲，母親Ellen Lyon23歲。他於1526年與Martha Emily Castell在英國坎布利其爾易亞斯特 哈特利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年在英國越可爾利德斯享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds于1508年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾法爾登时，他的父亲Christian Lambe26岁，母亲Ellen Lyon23岁。他于1526年与Martha Emily Castell在英国坎布利其爾易亞斯特 哈特利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年在英国越可爾利德斯享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ciaran, Ethna.

variants.name: Lamb
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Lamb, a pet form of Lambert .
English: nickname for a meek and inoffensive person, from Middle English lamb, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper of lambs. See also Lamm .

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luain ‘descendant of the warrior’, formerly Anglicized as O'Loan (see Lane 3). MacLysaght comments: "The form Lamb(e), which results from a more than usually absurd pseudo-translation (uan ‘lamb’), is now much more numerous than O'Loan itself.".

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds was born in 1508, in Farndon, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Christian Lambe, was 26 and his mother, Ellen Lyon, was 23. He married Martha Emily Castell in 1526, in East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1591, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds est né en 1508, à Farndon, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Christian Lambe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ellen Lyon, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Martha Emily Castell en 1526, à East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1591, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds 1508 in Farndon, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christian Lambe 26 und seine Mutter Ellen Lyon 23. Er hat 1526 in East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England Martha Emily Castell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1591 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Leeds, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds è nato il nel 1508 nel Farndon, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Christian Lambe, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Lyon, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Martha Emily Castell nel 1526, nel East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1591, nel Leeds, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leedsが1508年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアファルンドンで生まれた時，父Christian Lambeは26歳，母Ellen Lyonは23歳であった。1526年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエアスト ハトリーでMartha Emily Castellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1591年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds(이)가 1508년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 패른던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christian Lambe(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Lyon(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1526년 영국 캄브리지실르 이스트 하틀리에서 Martha Emily Castell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds nasceu em 1508, em Farndon, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Christian Lambe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Lyon, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha Emily Castell em 1526, em East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1591, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds родился в 1508 г. в местности фарндон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Christian Lambe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Lyon, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Emily Castell в 1526 г. в местности эаст хатли, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1591 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Adhelm Lambe of Leeds nació en 1508, en Farndon, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Christian Lambe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ellen Lyon, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Martha Emily Castell en 1526, en East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1591, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años.
